stage1_spider.label: Spider log files
stage1_spider.desc:
**Phase 1: Analysis (Spider Logs)**

Mapping data flows spanning multiple legacy databases. 

This invokes the Appraiser as **Medium/Heavy** depending on the spider depth. It will engage the *FinderAgent* inside the Assembly node for data discovery.

payload.mcp_intent: Spider legacy MSSQL Server logs identifying pricing table relations

c6: Allowing strictly defined DB internal ping.

c6: Allowing strictly defined DB internal ping.

stage2_a.label: Generate React Component
stage2_a.desc:
**Phase 2: Synthesis (Generate Specs)**

Translating spidered structural data into abstract specifications.

This maps directly to code generation. The CodegenAgent translates MSSQL relationships into a comprehensive GraphQL schema declaration.

payload.mcp_intent: Synthesize MSSQL Pricing schema into GraphQL Type Definitions

engine_sequence.message: 7) H.I.T.L: Pausing sequence for human authorization.

onReject.statusBoxHTML: PIPELINE ABORTED

stage3_a.label: Unit Test Generation
stage3_a.desc:
**Phase 3: Transformation (Conflict Res)**

A direct conflict in business logic (e.g. SCAPA mismatches or inheritance errors).

This forces a hard **Cache Miss** and invokes intense Codegen iteration, escalating directly to a mandatory **HITL Intervention** per operations safety rules.

payload.mcp_intent: Generate unit tests for auth module

engine_sequence.message: 7) H.I.T.L: Pausing sequence for human authorization.

stage4_a.label: Cache Layer Injection
stage4_a.desc:
**Phase 4: Integration (Webhooks)**

Connecting external SaaS applications into internal event buses.

The system finds a known webhook integration pattern, meaning it handles this as a **Light** task using verified cache logic.

payload.mcp_intent: Inject Redis caching wrappers around heavy SQL queries

c8: Virtualization skipped for known safe route.

engine_sequence.message: 8) Virtualize skipped for known safe route.

stage6_a.label: Staging Canary Deploy
stage6_a.desc:
**Phase 6: Testing (Mocks & Synthetic edge cases)**

Automatically generating hundreds of synthetic edge cases against a newly updated application tier to ensure absolute regression stability.

payload.mcp_intent: Route 5% of traffic to new microservice container

stage7_a.label: Log Ingestion Config
stage7_a.desc:
**Phase 7: Security (Triaging vulnerabilities)**

A critical zero-day has been detected in a node package. BRANIAC must construct a patch to downgrade safely without breaking dependency trees.

payload.mcp_intent: Attach Datadog agents to newly spun Kubernetes pods

c5: Downgrading package and resolving graph conflicts.

engine_sequence.message: 7) H.I.T.L: Pausing sequence for SEC-OPS authorization.
